.file-embed.background: rgb(24, 25, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(19, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.footnote-backref.footnote-link.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(146, 0, 255), rgb(146, 0, 255)) no-repeat scroll 0% 100% / 0% 1px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(146, 0, 255), rgb(146, 0, 255)) no-repeat scroll 0% 100% / 0% 1px padding-box border-box

a.internal-link[data-href=\"callouts\"][.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(rgb(146, 0, 255), rgb(146, 0, 255)) no-repeat scroll 0% 100% / 0% 1px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(146, 0, 255, 0.1) 0%, rgba(146, 0, 255, 0.02) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(19, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(19, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 5, 141, 0.15) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(19, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(13, 14, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(13, 14, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(19, 20, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(13, 14, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(24, 25, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(8, 8, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(8, 8, 10) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
